desc: the canonical debounced-search handler `$event.target.value` on Lit: Lit's @event binding has no contextual (contravariant) param type, so the synthesized param narrows BOTH .target and .currentTarget to the host element type — `$event.target.value` typechecks (was TS18047 target-possibly-null + TS2339 value-not-on-EventTarget)
discoveredBy: shape-matrix torture harness (spike 012, event-param typing pass)
